description: Normalized CUSAT CAT test-code metadata derived from the yearly test-code sheets and prospectus PDFs. This file is intended as a reference for what each test code represents across years.
notes: Descriptions are normalized across years; where the meaning of a code changed, the change is recorded in year_specific_usage.
pyq_years lists the years that currently have a code-named PDF in assets/data/raw/pyqs after the rename pass.
Older 2011-2015 wording is inferred from filenames and later prospectus patterns when the attached yearly code sheets were not available.
Code 615 appears in older prospectuses and PYQs, but the 2025-2026 OCRed code lists omit it; the raw 2025 Zoology paper is therefore left unresolved.

101.title: Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics entrance test
used_for: Several 5-year integrated science programmes in later years

year_specific_usage.summary: PCM technology entrance for B.Tech and 5-year integrated M.Sc. Photonics.
Still the main PCM technology entrance; prospectuses also route some integrated M.Sc. science programmes through this code.
Main PCM entrance for B.Tech and multiple integrated programmes; available PYQs for later years exist as separate shift papers rather than a single 101.pdf.

102.title: Lateral Entry to B.Tech
used_for: Admission to III semester B.Tech programmes

year_specific_usage.summary: B.Tech lateral entry test covering English, Mathematics, Engineering Mechanics, Engineering Graphics and General Engineering.
Common aptitude paper built around English, numerical reasoning, comprehension and logical reasoning.

104.title: Physics, Chemistry and Biology entrance test

year_specific_usage.summary: PCB entrance used for biology-track integrated M.Sc. admissions; later years run this as a sectioned, shift-based paper.

105.title: Economics and quantitative aptitude entrance test
used_for: Five-Year Integrated M.Sc. in Econometrics and Data Science

year_specific_usage.summary: Introduced for the integrated Econometrics and Data Science programme; 60 Economics, 60 quantitative aptitude and 30 English questions.

106.title: Hindi entrance test at Plus Two level
used_for: Five-Year Integrated M.A. in Hindi Language and Literature

year_specific_usage.summary: Introduced for the integrated Hindi programme; objective questions answerable by candidates with Hindi at Plus Two level.

201.title: Common integrated law aptitude test
used_for: 5-year B.Sc. LL.B. (Hons.) Computer Science in later years

year_specific_usage.summary: Common aptitude test for the 5-year BBA LL.B. and B.Com LL.B. programmes.
Expanded to include the 5-year B.Sc. LL.B. (Hons.) Computer Science programme.
Postgraduate Hindi entrance at a level answerable by candidates with Hindi as a second language at degree level.
Standard MCA aptitude test with mathematics and logical reasoning.
Shared test for MCA and M.Voc. Software Application Development.

502.title: M.Sc. Computer Science test
used_for: MCA lateral entry in older years

year_specific_usage.summary: Used for MCA lateral entry and/or M.Sc. Computer Science, depending on the prospectus year.
Used for M.Sc. Computer Science only.
Biotechnology paper; older prospectuses describe it as a composite of Biotechnology, Zoology, Botany and Chemistry.
Graduate-level Biotechnology paper with equal weightage to Biotechnology, Botany, Zoology and Chemistry.
Graduate-level Biotechnology paper weighted toward Biotechnology and Microbiology, with smaller Zoology, Botany, Biochemistry and Chemistry components.
Graduate-level Botany subject test.
Graduate-level Chemical Engineering subject test.
Graduate-level Chemistry subject test.
Graduate-level Electronic Science subject test.

607.title: Engineering Science
used_for: M.Sc. Environmental Science and Technology Stream I in later years

year_specific_usage.summary: Engineering Science subject test grouped with the other PG subject papers.
Explicitly described as the test for M.Sc. Environmental Science and Technology Stream I.

608.title: Fisheries / Fisheries Science
used_for: Fisheries and Fisheries Science postgraduate admissions

year_specific_usage.summary: Graduate-level Fisheries / Fisheries Science subject test.
Graduate-level Geology subject test.

610.title: Law / LL.M. paper
used_for: LL.M. (IPR) and related research tracks in some years

year_specific_usage.summary: Law paper for LL.M.; 2024 prospectus explicitly describes it as the standalone LL.M. test.
Broadened to cover LL.M., LL.M. (IPR), LL.M. (IP) Ph.D. and LL.M. (IPR) Ph.D. in one paper.

611.title: Life Sciences
used_for: Life Science and interdisciplinary life-science postgraduate admissions

year_specific_usage.summary: Life Sciences paper grouped with the PG subject tests.
Interdisciplinary life-science paper drawing on life science, medical science and agricultural science.
Weighted Life Sciences paper with Zoology, Botany, Microbiology and Biochemistry components.
Graduate-level Mathematics subject test.
Graduate-level Physics subject test.
Graduate-level Statistics subject test.

615.title: Zoology

year_specific_usage.summary: Graduate-level Zoology subject test.

remarks: A raw 2025 Zoology paper exists in pyqs, but the 2025-2026 OCRed code lists do not cleanly expose code 615.

616.title: Economics paper
used_for: Economics and Finance in later years

year_specific_usage.summary: Used for M.A. Applied Economics.
Renamed in the prospectus as Test in Economics and Finance.
Graduate-level Instrumentation subject test.
Graduate-level Food Science subject test.
Three-year LL.B. aptitude test.
LL.B. paper explicitly described around legal aptitude, logical reasoning, English, comprehension and current affairs.

620.title: IP / IPR law research aptitude test

year_specific_usage.summary: Aptitude test for the intellectual-property law research tracks.
Aptitude test for M.Voc. Mobile Phone Application Development.
Renamed as the aptitude test for M.Voc. Software Application Development.
Aptitude test for M.Voc. Technology and Management Consulting.
Graduate-level Microbiology paper.

624.title: Econometrics and Financial Technology
used_for: M.Sc. in Econometrics and Financial Technology

year_specific_usage.summary: Aptitude test for M.Sc. in Econometrics and Financial Technology.
Forensic Science aptitude paper with equal weightage across physics, chemistry, biology, forensic science and computer science.
Bioethics aptitude paper covering English, general knowledge, analytical reasoning, law and life sciences.
